title: Attack Cooldown
description: Adds a cooldown to an entity. The intention of this cooldown is to be used to prevent the entity from attempting to acquire new attack targets.

attack_cooldown_complete_event.title: Attack Cooldown Complete Event
attack_cooldown_complete_event.description: Event to be run when the cooldown is complete. Can be an object with event and target properties, or a simple event string.

attack_cooldown_time.title: Attack Cooldown Time
attack_cooldown_time.description: Amount of time in seconds for the cooldown. Can be specified as a number or a pair of numbers (min and max).
